rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing should be expressed in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts
Preserve component port directions and data types when defining signal routing
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-specific subcomponent ports directly
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level assignments must be placed in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL property associations as AGREE variables
